title: EventArchetype
description: AI-fillable narration template: structure without scripting (emergent-endgames ruling, Program 20 Track B).

id.description: Archetype identifier; matches the JSON filename stem.

event_types.description: EventType values (uppercased) this archetype narrates. Each string must name a real babylon.models.enums.EventType member.

slots.description: Named facts the AI must fill from observed engine state only, never invented.

guidance.description: Narration instructions steering tone and material grounding.
